mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM HC_MEMBER AS hm WHERE 1=1 AND hm.MEM_STAT != 'delete' AND hm.MEM_ID = #{userId}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT
, (SELECT hd.DEPT_CODE FROM HC_DEPT hd WHERE hd.DEPT_ID = hm.DEPT_ID) AS DEPT_CODE , (SELECT hd.DEPT_NAME FROM HC_DEPT hd WHERE hd.DEPT_ID = hm.DEPT_ID) AS DEPT_NAME , (SELECT hd.DEPT_ENG_NAME FROM HC_DEPT hd WHERE hd.DEPT_ID = hm.DEPT_ID) AS DEPT_ENG_NAME FROM HC_MEMBER AS hm WHERE hm.MEM_STAT != 'delete' ) hm WHERE 1=1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT
, (SELECT hd.DEPT_CODE FROM HC_DEPT hd WHERE hd.DEPT_ID = hm.DEPT_ID) AS DEPT_CODE , (SELECT hd.DEPT_NAME FROM HC_DEPT hd WHERE hd.DEPT_ID = hm.DEPT_ID) AS DEPT_NAME , (SELECT hd.DEPT_ENG_NAME FROM HC_DEPT hd WHERE hd.DEPT_ID = hm.DEPT_ID) AS DEPT_ENG_NAME FROM HC_MEMBER AS hm WHERE hm.MEM_STAT != 'delete' ) hm WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY MEM_REG_DT ASC

SELECT
, (SELECT hd.DEPT_CODE FROM HC_DEPT hd WHERE hd.DEPT_ID = hm.DEPT_ID) AS DEPT_CODE , (SELECT hd.DEPT_NAME FROM HC_DEPT hd WHERE hd.DEPT_ID = hm.DEPT_ID) AS DEPT_NAME , (SELECT hd.DEPT_ENG_NAME FROM HC_DEPT hd WHERE hd.DEPT_ID = hm.DEPT_ID) AS DEPT_ENG_NAME FROM HC_MEMBER hm WHERE 1=1 AND hm.MEM_STAT != 'delete' AND hm.MEM_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO HC_MEMBER (DEPT_ID, MEM_ID, MEM_NAME, MEM_TYPE, MEM_STAT, MEM_BEFO_PWD, MEM_PWD, MEM_GENDER, MEM_BIRTHDAY, MEM_PHONE, MEM_EMAIL, MEM_REG_ID, MEM_REG_DT, MEM_MOD_ID, MEM_MOD_DT, MEM_LST_DT, MEM_FAIL_CNT, MEM_FAIL_DT, MEM_COLUMN1, MEM_COLUMN2) VALUES (#{deptId}, #{memId}, #{memName}, NULL, #{memStat}, #{memBefoPwd}, #{memPwd}, #{memGender}, #{memBirthday}, #{memPhone}, #{memEmail}, #{memRegId}, sysdate(), #{memModId}, sysdate(), sysdate(), 0, SYSDATE(), #{memColumn1}, #{memColumn2})
INSERT INTO HC_MEMBER_ROLE (MEM_SEQ, MEM_ID, ROLE_ID) VALUES (#{memSeq}, #{memId}, #{roleId})
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM HC_MEMBER hm INNER JOIN HC_MEMBER_ROLE hmr on hm.MEM_SEQ = hmr.MEM_SEQ INNER JOIN HC_ROLE hr on hmr.ROLE_ID = hr.ROLE_ID WHERE 1=1 AND hm.MEM_STAT != 'delete' AND hr.ROLE_TYPE = 'login' AND hm.MEM_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE HC_MEMBER hm INNER JOIN HC_MEMBER_ROLE hmr on hm.MEM_SEQ = hmr.MEM_SEQ INNER JOIN HC_ROLE hr on hmr.ROLE_ID = hr.ROLE_ID SET hmr.ROLE_ID = #{roleId} WHERE 1=1 AND hm.MEM_STAT != 'delete' AND hr.ROLE_TYPE = 'login' AND hmr.MEM_ID = #{memId}

DELETE hmr FROM HC_MEMBER hm INNER JOIN HC_MEMBER_ROLE hmr on hm.MEM_SEQ = hmr.MEM_SEQ INNER JOIN HC_ROLE hr on hmr.ROLE_ID = hr.ROLE_ID WHERE 1=1 AND hm.MEM_STAT != 'delete' AND hr.ROLE_TYPE = 'login' AND hmr.MEM_ID = #{memId}
